prompt: Draw a simple hand-drawn doodle of the attached photo, as if it were sketched by a person using a black marker. Use natural marker strokes, slightly wobbly outlines, subtle hand-drawn imperfections, slightly open line endings, and create a warm editorial doodle aesthetic. Avoid clean vector-style graphics and overly polished digital perfection. Keep the illustration simple, airy, flat, and understated. Use sky blue only as an accent color.
promptEn: Draw a simple hand-drawn doodle of the attached photo, as if it were sketched by a person using a black marker. Use natural marker strokes, slightly wobbly outlines, subtle hand-drawn imperfections, slightly open line endings, and create a warm editorial doodle aesthetic. Avoid clean vector-style graphics and overly polished digital perfection. Keep the illustration simple, airy, flat, and understated. Use sky blue only as an accent color.
promptZh: 请根据附图绘制一个简单的手绘涂鸦，就像是用 黑色记号笔 亲手勾勒的一样。使用自然的记号笔笔触、略显不稳的轮廓、细腻的手绘瑕疵以及微开的线条末端，营造出一种温暖的编辑风格涂鸦美感。避免使用干净的矢量图形和过于精致的数字效果。保持插图简约、通透、扁平且低调。仅使用 天蓝色 作为点缀色。
